title: Multi-channel order management
abstract: A merchant system including an order management application and method of integrating orders received from multiple ordering channels is described. An aggregated order queue is established including multiple orders from multiple different ordering channels. The orders are processed for fulfillment and a delivery channel is selected from multiple delivery channels for delivery of the one or more items of the order. The multiple orders, regardless of the ordering channel originating the order, and delivery channels may be managed via a single user interface.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A system comprising: a memory to store instructions; and a processing device operativelv coupled to the memory, the processing device to execute the instructions to: receive a first order from a first ordering channel communicatively coupled to the application, wherein the first order comprises first order details, receive a second order from a second ordering channel communicatively coupled to the application, wherein the second order comprises second order details; aggregate the first order details and the second order details into an aggregated order queue; select a first delivery channel to deliver one or more items associated with fulfillment of the first order; and send at least a portion of the first order details to the first delivery channel. 2, The system of claim 1, the processing device to execute the instructions to: receive first status information from the first delivery channel; determine first deliver}' data associated with the first delivery channel, wherein the first delivery data represents a first estimated delivery time for the first order; receive second status information from the second delivery channel; and determine second delivery data associated with the second delivery channel, wherein the second delivery data represents a second estimated delivery time for the first order, wherein the first estimated deliver}' time is less than the second estimated delivery time. 3 The system of claim 1, the processing device to execute the instructions to: channel . 4. The system of claim 1, the processing device to execute the instructions to: cause at least a portion of the aggregated order queue to be displayed via a user interface. 5. The system of claim 1, the processing device to execute the instructions to: generate a consolidated report based on the first order details and the second order details. 6. The system of claim 1, the processing device to execute the instructions to: generate analytics data based on the first order details and the second order details. 7, The system of claim 1, the processing device to execute the instructions to: determine first delivery data associated with the first delivery channel; determine second delivery data associated with the second deliver}' channel; and generate analytics data based on the first order details, the second order details, the first delivery data, and the second delivery data. 8 A method comprising: identifying, by an application executed by a processing device of an electronic device, a first order in an aggregated order queue comprising a plurality of orders, the first order comprising first order details received from a first ordering channel communicatively coupled to the application; extracting the first order details from the first order; selecting a first deliveiy channel from a plurality of delivery channels based on the first order details and deliver}' data associated with the first delivery channel; and sending at least a portion of the first order details to the first delivery channel. 9. The method of claim 8, further comprising: receiving confirmation information from the first delivery channel relating to delivery of the first order. 10. The method of claim 8, further comprising: causing at least a portion of order details associated with a plurality of orders to be displayed via a user interface of the user device. 1 1 The method of claim 8, further comprising: 

 causing at least a portion of deliver}' data associated with a plurality of delivery channel be displayed via the user interface. 12. The method of claim 8, further comprising: converting the first order from a first format associated with the first ordering channel to a second format associated with the application. 13. The method of claim 8, further comprising: identifying a second order in the aggregated order queue comprising a plurality of orders, the second order comprising second order details received from as second ordering channel communicatively coupled to the application. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising: extracting the second order details from the first order; selecting a second delivery channel from the plurality of delivery channels based on the second order details and second delivery data associated with the second delivery channel; and sending at least a portion of the second order details to the second delivery channel. 15. The method of claim 13, further comprising: determining a load balancing of the first food deliver}' channel and the second food delivery channel based on the first order details and the second order details.
